name: list_property
full_help:
list_property

Description: 
List properties of object

Syntax: 
list_property  [-class <arg>] [-regexp] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<object>]
               [<pattern>]

Returns: 
list of property names

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-class]     Object type to query for properties. Ignored if object is 
               specified.
  [-regexp]    Pattern is treated as a regular expression
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<object>]   Object to query for properties
  [<pattern>]  Pattern to match properties against
               Default: *

Categories: 
Object, PropertyAndParameter
